---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a workflow, template, docs, or helper-tool improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve for play, setup, continuity, or maintenance?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful version.

## Why this belongs in RePoG

Explain why this should be part of the workspace instead of handled only by the
agent's general reasoning.

## Preferred layer

Choose one if you know:

- Documentation
- Workflow
- Template
- Example campaign
- Helper tool

## Additional context

Screenshots, excerpts, or related tools are welcome.
